data.title: UAE pushed Gulf states to join military response against Iran’s attacks | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: The UAE attempted to convince Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and other Gulf states to coordinate a military response to Iran’s missile and drone attacks, but neighbors refused, sources told Bloomberg.
data.keywords: Iran,Saudi Arabia,United Arab Emirates,Qatar,UAE,Mohammed bin Salman,bahrain,kuwait,Oman,Gulf Cooperation Council,Trump Administration,airstrike,Gulf States,Mohammed bin Zayed al-Nahyan,MBZ,mbs,Operation Epic Fury,Operation Roaring Lion
